title: Chore: Add performance monitoring
original_text: Added performance monitoring with APM integration. Implemented request timing tracking. Added database query performance monitoring. Implemented memory usage monitoring. Added CPU usage monitoring. Implemented performance alerting. Added performance dashboard. Result: performance monitoring operational.
